continuity_constraints: keep the same traveler silhouette in every scene
preserve coastal wind and sunset atmosphere
maintain emotional progression from grief to resolve
global_continuity.scene_ordering_logic: Start with arrival, hold on reflective stillness, then transition into subtle internal resolve.

scenes.narrative_purpose: establish solitude, environment and emotional baseline
scenes.main_subject: lone traveler in a long coat
scenes.visual_composition: wide shot with the traveler small in frame against a large sky and ocean
continuity_notes: keep the cliff and horizon readable
image_generation_notes: keep wind visible in coat movement
retain dramatic clouds and warm light

scenes.narrative_purpose: hold the emotional center of the story
scenes.location_environment: same cliff edge with ocean and dramatic sky
scenes.visible_action: standing motionless and looking toward the horizon
scenes.visual_composition: wide emotional composition with the character centered low in frame and strong sky dominance
continuity_notes: same wardrobe and same angle family
image_generation_notes: focus on emotional scale over detail clutter

scenes.narrative_purpose: signal the subtle emotional shift toward renewal
scenes.location_environment: same cliff at the end of sunset with slightly softer sky opening
scenes.main_subject: lone traveler preparing to move forward
scenes.visible_action: a slight shift in posture as the traveler turns away from stillness
scenes.visual_composition: medium-wide shot with clearer body readability while preserving the environment
continuity_notes: slight lift in light tone but not a full location change
image_generation_notes: show transition in posture rather than action explosion
keep composition clean for later motion
